articles.title: Japaneasy Eats: Kyoto chef at AMK kopitiam serves Scotch egg & meatball katsu, 3-day rolled chashu & ramen
articles.content: For those unfamiliar, katsu is essentially a meat or seafood cutlet that’s coated in flaky panko breadcrumbs, then deep-fried till divinely crispy. Curiosity slid into my DMs the moment I spotted specials like Scotch egg and meatball katsu. Toss in some housemade chashu, ramen, and the fact it’s made by an actual Japanese chef. Consider me intrigued!. Japaneasy Eats, opened in June 2025, was founded by Kyoto-born chef Okada Hiroshi and his business partner, Kay

articles.title: PUB officers to have powers to conduct forced entry to address coastal flood risk under new Bill
articles.content: Officers with Singapore's national water agency PUB may soon have powers to forcibly enter a landowner's premises to address coastal flood risks. Immunities for authorised officers will also only apply if they have acted in good faith...

articles.title: Police investigating after ambulance seen speeding along Stadium Road
articles.content: Investigations into a private ambulance are ongoing after footage showing it driving recklessly near Stadium Road went viral online. The ambulance can then be seen driving over the kerb and stopping, narrowly missing oncoming traffic. AsiaOne has reached out to Goodwill Ambulance Services Group for more information.
